message:
fix(build): comment out mandatory path overrides and update frankensearch pin

Two fixes for build reproducibility:

1. Comment out all [patch] sections in Cargo.toml that required sibling
   repos (frankensqlite, franken_agent_detection, frankensearch) to exist
   on disk. These are now opt-in for local development — a clean clone
   builds using the pinned git revisions. Changed corresponding build.rs
   contracts from ActivePathOverride to StrictOptIn so validation skips
   gracefully when sibling repos are absent.

2. Update frankensearch pin from 9961c0e7 to fa186910. The cass code at
   two_tier_search.rs:446,488 already expects Vec<Option<f32>> from
   quality_scores_for_hits(), but the old pin returned Vec<f32>,
   causing compilation errors (E0277, E0599). The new pin includes the
   Option<f32> API change from frankensearch commit fa186910.

Closes #181, closes #182

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
